title: begonia bidentata var. bidentata
intro: Begonia bidentata var. bidentata is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae, commonly known as the 'Two-toothed Begonia' or 'Two-toothed Begonia of China'. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various forms of medicine, particularly in Chinese herbalism, due to its reported medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of Begonia bidentata var. bidentata have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and gastrointestinal problems, and are believed to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is said to promote overall health and well-being.
